data.title: Write structural boundary tests for WORKTREE_TRACKING resume scan sections in sprint and fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
## Story
930f-8991 — Auto-detect and recover single abandoned worktree branch on resume

## testing_mode
RED

## What
Create new test file `tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-resume-scan.sh` with structural boundary tests:

1. sprint/SKILL.md Auto-Resume Detection has WORKTREE_TRACKING resume scan block:
   - test_sprint_auto_resume_has_tracking_scan: grep for 'WORKTREE_TRACKING' in Auto-Resume Detection section of sprint/SKILL.md
   - test_sprint_resume_scan_mentions_unmatched_start: grep for 'unmatched' or 'no corresponding' in the scan section
   - test_sprint_resume_scan_covers_child_tickets: grep for 'ticket list' or 'child' in the scan section

2. fix-bug/SKILL.md has Auto-Resume Detection section with scan:
   - test_fix_bug_has_auto_resume_detection: grep for 'Auto-Resume Detection' in fix-bug/SKILL.md
   - test_fix_bug_resume_has_tracking_scan: grep for 'WORKTREE_TRACKING' near Step 0.5
   - test_fix_bug_resume_mentions_abandoned_branch: grep for 'abandoned' or 'unmatched' in that section

## .test-index entries to add
```
plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-resume-scan.sh
plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-resume-scan.sh
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New test file exists at tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-resume-scan.sh and is executable
- [ ] All 6 tests run and fail RED (SKILL.md files not yet modified)
- [ ] .test-index has entries for both sprint/SKILL.md and fix-bug/SKILL.md pointing to this test file
- [ ] Tests use grep-based structural boundary pattern (not content-coupled assertions)
